title.en: This barrier is called the Forbidden River!

content.en:
Although the Dark Sanctuary is only an area of concentrated resources in the Dark Forbidden Domain, and is also considered to be the depths and core of the Dark Forbidden Domain, in fact, there is a barrier between the realm around the Dark Sanctuary and the Dark Sanctuary.

This barrier is called the Forbidden River!

It is very rare that the Forbidden River is formed by the convergence of the dark and forbidden forces to form a special river.

And this river surrounds the Dark Sanctuary, and also creates a prosperous treasure like the Dark Sanctuary.

However, this forbidden river is very dangerous, it contains a large number of forbidden creatures, not all of them coexist in parallel with other cultivators like the Forbidden Holy Gate, and many of them don't even have much intelligence, they all rely on instinct.

Without the cultivation and strength of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, once he dares to cross the forbidden river, he will almost 100% fall, even if it is the strongest domain ancestor, there is a 10% chance that he will fall, but basically the vast majority of the Supreme Domain Ancestor can cross the forbidden river, unless it is too bad luck.

Who wouldn't want to enter the Dark Sanctuary?

There is infinite hope and a future!

Although the War Realm Tower can connect the Dark Sanctuary and the Realm, how many realms can have the War Realm Tower Projection Tower?

Seldom!

And even if there is a War Boundary Tower, what's the use of not being able to get out? There is still no way to get too many resources, and it is destined to not go far.

Those top domain ancestors of the Divine Heaven Realm have been trapped in this realm for countless years, and there is no way to break through, and the only hope is that mysterious treasure!

Therefore, Ye Tian understood the meaning of what the Mountain Lord of Fengshan said.

At this time, the Wind Mountain Mountain Lord continued, "Those top domain ancestors of the Divine Heaven Realm have been at the top domain ancestor level for countless years. Maybe you don't know how long the Divine Heaven Realm has existed, but I can tell you that the Divine Heaven Realm has existed for nearly a realm era!"

"What, a Realm Era? you mean......"

Ye Tian was shocked.

"That's right!" the Mountain Lord of the Wind Mountain sighed, "The Divine Heaven Realm is about to fall into a state of destruction, once the realm is broken, all the creatures in the realm will fall, and they must flee the realm." And all the living beings below the Dao Ancestor will die, and only the cultivators above the Dao Ancestor will have a glimmer of life! Moreover, when the realm is shattered, there will inevitably be a world of great terror. Our Black Wind Mountain wants to find a new way to retreat, not only because it is difficult to get along in the Divine Heaven Realm, but more importantly, to find a way out. Otherwise, we don't need to risk a full retreat. Most of the forces in the Divine Heaven Realm didn't know about the destruction of the realm, and only a few domain ancestors knew about it. Those top domain ancestors should also know, but some top domain ancestors dare to take risks, and some dare not take risks!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian suddenly realized.

Mysterious treasures are only one reason, the bigger reason is to find the New Realm as a new place of hope.

And although the Dao Mountain Realm is not young, it is much better than the Divine Heaven Realm.

Therefore, after knowing the situation in the Dao Mountain Realm, all the powerhouses of the Black Wind Mountain crossed the Dark Forbidden Domain and went to the Dao Mountain Realm, even if they paid some price for this, they must all come over, otherwise the situation of the Black Wind Mountain will be even more difficult in the future.

Moreover, there is also a forbidden realm here, as well as the War Realm Tower, which can be connected to the Dark Sanctuary.

It can be said that the cultivation environment here is now even better than that of the Divine Heaven Realm.

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors, you have to be careful of the other forces. The Heavenly Emperor Palace has never been a threat, and the Vast Sea Ancestor is only an elite domain ancestor now, but other forces are afraid that they have a top domain ancestor. There is also that Lingyun Domain Ancestor, I don't know which force he is the Domain Ancestor, it may be a loose cultivator, but it may also be under the command of those top Domain Ancestors, you must be careful of the forces behind him. We currently have six domain ancestors in Black Wind Mountain, I am an Elite Domain Ancestor, the Black Mountain Lord is also an Elite Domain Ancestor, and the Lord of Black Wind Mountain is infinitely close to the top Domain Ancestor, but it is still not a top Domain Ancestor. Therefore, we in Black Wind Mountain are afraid that we will not be able to withstand the attack of a top domain ancestor! If there is danger, you will directly enter Black Wind Mountain, and use the formation of Black Wind Mountain and the power of the world to resist the top domain ancestor, there should be some hope!"

The Mountain Lord of Wind Mountain proposed.

"Wind Mountain Lord, I know!"

Ye Tian nodded.

He didn't say that he could easily kill a top domain ancestor, and even had the ability to fight with the supreme domain ancestor.

Having said that, the Wind Mountain Lord can't understand it.

After all, his current realm is only one realm!

But the arrangement of the mountain lord of Wind Mountain this time made him very grateful to Black Wind Mountain.

Therefore, if Black Wind Mountain is in trouble, he will inevitably come to his aid and suppress the enemy.

With him, those top domain ancestors in the Divine Heaven Realm are rubbish, nothing at all.

As time passed, those domain ancestors of the Divine Heaven Realm got closer and closer to the Dao Mountain Realm.

And the Vast Sea Ancestor was alone, without the drag of his subordinates, so he was the fastest, and arrived at the Daoshan Realm first than the people of Black Wind Mountain.

--------------

this day.

At the edge of the Daoshan Realm, a figure covered in scars walked out of the Dark Forbidden Domain.

"It's finally here!"

The man sighed.

He was none other than the Vast Sea Ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

At this time, he was more seriously injured than before, and he also encountered a little trouble in the dark forbidden realm.

After all, as a domain ancestor, the trouble he attracted was even more terrifying, so he suffered some injuries.

Fortunately, he arrived at the Daoshan Realm, and these injuries on his body could be repaired slowly.

At this moment, one after another figures appeared in front of the Vast Sea Ancestor.

These people were none other than the Dragon Shadow Palace Master, the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master and others, and they had received the summons from the Vast Sea Ancestor early, so they were waiting around here.

"Meet the Emperor of the Great Sea!"

"Meet the Emperor of the Great Sea!"

"Meet the Emperor of the Great Sea!"

Many half-step domain ancestors bowed one after another.

The Vast Sea Ancestor looked at the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master, nodded and said, "Very good, the two of you will soon be not far from the Domain Ancestor, and our Heavenly Emperor Palace has also given birth to so many half-step Domain Ancestors, which are much stronger than our peak, Dragon Shadow, Thunder Tribulation, you two have done a good job!"

Although a few familiar faces had disappeared, he didn't care.

If you die, you will die, as long as the Heavenly Emperor Palace is still there, then it will be fine.

"Heavenly Emperor, let's go back, the situation in the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm is a little complicated now!"

The main path of the Dragon Shadow Palace.

"Okay, then go back first!"

Haohai Sea Ancestor nodded.

He also needs to repair his injuries well, otherwise there are enemies behind him, and he may not be able to fight against them.
